function nearestIndex(arr, val){
  if(!Array.isArray(arr) || arr.length===0) return -1;
  const target = Number(val);
  let bestIdx = 0;
  let best = Infinity;
  for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++){
    const a = Number(arr[i]);
    const d = Math.abs(a - target);
    if(d < best){
      best = d; bestIdx = i;
    }
  }
  return bestIdx;
}

function _excelNearest2D(table, rowAxis, colAxis, rowVal, colVal){
  const i = nearestIndex(rowAxis, rowVal);
  const j = nearestIndex(colAxis, colVal);
  if(i < 0 || j < 0) return NaN;
  const row = table[i];
  if(!row || j >= row.length) return NaN;
  const v = Number(row[j]);
  return Number.isFinite(v) ? v : NaN;
}

function calcTwoEngTODistExcel(parms, flapTag){
  // parms: {pa, tempC, wt, hw, slopePct}
  const t = (flapTag === 'F40') ? EXCEL_TOD_F40 : EXCEL_TOD_F0;
  const pa = Number(parms.pa);
  const tempC = Number(parms.tempC);
  const wt = Number(parms.wt);
  const hw = Number(parms.hw);
  const slopePct = Number(parms.slopePct); // percent, e.g. 1.5 for +1.5%
  if(!Number.isFinite(pa) || !Number.isFinite(tempC) || !Number.isFinite(wt) || !Number.isFinite(hw) || !Number.isFinite(slopePct)){
    return "Need Input";
  }
  const q11 = _excelNearest2D(t.pa_temp_table, t.temp_rows, t.pa_headers, tempC, pa);
  if(!Number.isFinite(q11)) return "Out of Range";
  const q12 = _excelNearest2D(t.wt_q11_table, t.wt_rows, t.q11_headers, wt, q11);
  if(!Number.isFinite(q12)) return "Out of Range";
  const q13 = _excelNearest2D(t.wind_q12_table, t.wind_rows, t.q12_headers, Math.abs(hw), q12);
  if(!Number.isFinite(q13)) return "Out of Range";
  const base = _excelNearest2D(t.final_table, t.final_wt_rows, t.final_headers, wt, q13);
  if(!Number.isFinite(base)) return "Out of Range";
  const slopeFrac = slopePct/100.0;
  const out = Math.round(base * (1 + slopeFrac*5));
  return Number.isFinite(out) ? out : "Out of Range";
}


function calcAccelStopExcel(legOrInputs, flapMode) {
  // Excel-parity implementation using embedded 29.1-10 (F0) / 29.1-12 (F40) Accel-Stop tables.
  // Supports BOTH calling styles:
  //   1) calcAccelStopExcel(legIndex, flapMode)          [legacy]
  //   2) calcAccelStopExcel({pa,tempC,wt,wind,...}, ...) [used by the main compute loop]

  let pAlt, tempC, wt, hw;

  if (legOrInputs !== null && typeof legOrInputs === 'object' && !Array.isArray(legOrInputs)) {
    // object style
    pAlt = _asNumber(legOrInputs.pa ?? legOrInputs.press_alt ?? legOrInputs.pressAlt ?? legOrInputs.pressureAlt ?? legOrInputs.press_altitude);
    tempC = _asNumber(legOrInputs.tempC ?? legOrInputs.temp_to ?? legOrInputs.temp ?? legOrInputs.temperatureC);
    wt   = _asNumber(legOrInputs.wt ?? legOrInputs.weight ?? legOrInputs.to_weight ?? legOrInputs.weightLb ?? legOrInputs.weightLbs);
    hw   = _asNumber(legOrInputs.wind ?? legOrInputs.headwind ?? legOrInputs.hw ?? legOrInputs.headwindKt ?? legOrInputs.headwindKts);
  } else {
    // leg index style
    const leg = legOrInputs;
    pAlt  = _asNumber(getLegValue(leg, 'takeoff_pressureAlt'));
    tempC = _asNumber(getLegValue(leg, 'takeoff_tempC'));
    wt    = _asNumber(getLegValue(leg, 'takeoff_weight'));
    hw    = _asNumber(getLegValue(leg, 'takeoff_headwind'));
  }

  if (![pAlt,tempC,wt,hw].every(Number.isFinite)) return "Need Input";

  const model = (String(flapMode||"F0").toUpperCase().includes("40")) ? EXCEL_ACCELSTOP_F40 : EXCEL_ACCELSTOP_F0;
  const v = _calcAccelStopExcel_NEAREST(model, pAlt, tempC, wt, hw);
  if (!Number.isFinite(v)) return "Out of Range";
  return Math.round(v);
}
